Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on ethylene (C₂H₄, 6 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fitted) in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken directly from the user-supplied .xyz file (no re-optimization). SCF converged in 6 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

HOMO (index 7): −7.6155818 eV
LUMO (index 8): −0.17986527 eV
HOMO–LUMO gap: 7.4357165 eV (headline result)

Total electronic energy: −78.623486 Hartree (−2139.4541 eV).

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz
